name: Pulse Laser
description: Short-burst coherent light weapon — rapid fire, low damage per shot

name: Phased Array
description: Multi-emitter beam array with improved tracking

name: Particle Beam Cannon
description: Accelerated particle stream that strips armour at the atomic level

name: Disruptor Beam
description: Disrupts molecular bonds — devastating against shields

name: Radiation Ray
description: Ionising radiation projector — damages crew and systems through hull

name: Plasma Lance
description: Superheated plasma stream — the most powerful beam weapon

name: Kinetic Cannon
description: Electromagnetic railgun firing solid slugs

name: Battering Ram
description: Reinforced prow spike for ramming manoeuvres

name: Mass Driver
description: High-velocity mass accelerator — punches through armour at extreme range

name: Gauss Cannon
description: Magnetically accelerated rounds with devastating impact

name: Missile Battery
description: Standard self-propelled guided missiles — rapid salvo fire

name: Basic Torpedo
description: Self-propelled explosive warhead

name: Guided Torpedo
description: Smart-tracking torpedo with terminal guidance

name: Fusion Torpedo
description: Fusion-warhead torpedo — massive blast radius

name: Antimatter Torpedo
description: Antimatter annihilation warhead — devastating against capital ships

name: Singularity Torpedo
description: Creates a micro-singularity at the point of impact

name: Point Defence Turret
description: Rapid-fire close-in weapon system for intercepting missiles and fighters

name: High Energy Flares
description: Deploys high-energy flare bursts to confuse and destroy incoming missiles

name: Light Fighter Bay
description: Launches 4 light strike craft

name: Heavy Fighter Bay
description: Launches 8 heavily armoured strike craft

name: Deflector Shield
description: Basic energy barrier — absorbs incoming damage

name: Shield Harmonics
description: Resonance-tuned shields with faster recharge

name: Neutronium Barrier
description: Ultra-dense energy barrier — excellent kinetic absorption

name: Phase Shield
description: Partially phase-shifts incoming projectiles — the pinnacle of antimatter-era shielding

name: Composite Plate
description: Standard layered composite hull plating

name: Advanced Composite
description: Improved composite with ceramic interlayers

name: Enhanced Composite
description: Molecular-bonded composite matrix

name: Reactive Armour
description: Explosive-reactive tiles that detonate outward on impact

name: Hardened Reactive Armour
description: Second-generation reactive plating with layered detonation chambers

name: Nano-Weave Plating
description: Self-repairing nano-fibre mesh

name: Reinforced Nano-Weave
description: Dense nano-fibre lattice with rare-element threading

name: Neutronium Hull Plating
description: Ultra-dense neutronium alloy

name: Phase-Shift Armour
description: Dimensional phase plating — weapons pass through

name: Singularity Shell
description: Micro-singularity lattice warps space around the hull

name: Ion Engine
description: Basic ion thruster — reliable but low output

name: Fusion Reactor Drive
description: Fusion-powered drive with significantly more power

name: Antimatter Drive
description: Antimatter annihilation engine — extreme power output

name: Singularity Drive
description: Harnesses a contained micro-singularity — ultimate power source

name: Basic Warp Drive
description: Enables inter-system travel by warping spacetime

name: Enhanced Warp Drive
description: Improved warp coils for faster inter-system transit

name: Transwarp Drive
description: Tears a temporary wormhole — near-instant travel

name: Short-Range Scanner
description: Basic sensor array

name: Deep Space Scanner
description: Long-range detection array

name: Field Repair Unit
description: Automated repair drones

name: Grappling Claws
description: Mechanical appendages that latch onto and crush enemy hulls

name: Basic Life Support
description: Standard crew life support — improves morale recovery

name: Advanced Life Support
description: Enhanced crew quarters and medical bays

name: Targeting Computer Mk I
description: Fire-control system — increases weapon accuracy

name: Targeting Computer Mk II
description: Advanced fire-control with predictive tracking

name: Advanced Sensor Suite
description: Long-range detection array with deep-scan capability

name: Damage Control System
description: Automated repair drones and hull sealant

name: Flare Dispenser
description: Compact thermal decoy launcher — draws heat-seeking missiles away from the craft

name: Compact Jammer
description: Miniaturised electronic warfare pod for fighters — disrupts missile guidance and targeting

name: Adaptive ECM Pod
description: AI-driven miniature ECM that adapts to enemy targeting frequencies in real time

name: Phase Flicker Pod
description: Micro phase-shifting unit — briefly renders the craft invisible to targeting systems

name: Quantum Decoy Pod
description: Projects quantum-entangled sensor ghosts — virtually impossible to distinguish from the real craft

name: ECM Suite Mk I
description: Electronic countermeasures — reduces enemy accuracy

name: ECM Suite Mk II
description: Advanced electronic warfare suite

name: Capacitor Bank
description: Energy storage cells — provides additional power buffer

name: Fusion Battery
description: Compact fusion cells — significant power reserves

name: Antimatter Battery
description: Antimatter containment cells — massive stored energy

name: Zero-Point Cell
description: Extracts energy from quantum vacuum — near-unlimited buffer

name: Basic Scanner
description: Rudimentary sensor sweep module.

name: Geological Scanner
description: Subsurface resonance imager — reveals exact mineral concentrations.

name: Biological Scanner
description: Atmospheric spectrograph and bio-resonance array.

name: Anomaly Detector
description: Subspace frequency analyser tuned to precursor energy signatures.

name: Deep Space Telescope
description: Long-baseline interferometric telescope.

name: Medical Bay
description: Fully equipped sickbay with surgical suites and quarantine wards.

name: Electronic Warfare Suite
description: Broadband jammer and spoofing transmitter.

name: Repair Drone Bay
description: Autonomous nano-fabricator drones — perform field repairs on allied vessels.

name: Singularity Barrier
description: Gravitational lens barrier that warps incoming fire around the hull

name: Antimatter Accelerator
description: Fires antimatter-tipped slugs that annihilate on contact

name: Singularity Driver
description: Launches micro-singularity projectiles that distort space on impact

name: Fusion Autocannon
description: Rapid-fire magnetically accelerated rounds powered by a compact fusion core

name: Petaflop Core
description: Baseline shipboard computer for navigation and system coordination.

name: Tactical Computer Core
description: Enhanced processing for target tracking and battle coordination.

name: Neural Computer Core
description: Predictive AI-assisted combat and navigation system.

name: Basic Life Support
description: Standard atmospheric recycling and temperature regulation.

name: Advanced Life Support
description: Improved air quality, gravity compensation, and crew comfort.

name: Biosphere Life Support
description: Self-sustaining micro-ecosystem with full atmospheric regeneration.

name: Basic Sensor Suite
description: Standard electromagnetic and gravitational sensor array.

name: Enhanced Sensor Suite
description: Multi-spectrum analysis with improved detection algorithms.

name: Deep Scan Sensor Suite
description: Subspace resonance scanning with predictive threat analysis.

name: Fission Reactor
description: Baseline fission reactor providing power to all ship systems.

name: Fusion Reactor
description: Compact fusion reactor with higher output and better efficiency.

name: Antimatter Reactor
description: Antimatter annihilation reactor for exceptional power generation.

name: Chemical RCS
description: Basic chemical reaction control thrusters for attitude adjustment.

name: Ion RCS
description: Ion-propelled manoeuvring thrusters for improved agility.

name: Plasma RCS
description: High-thrust plasma vectoring for exceptional combat manoeuvrability.

name: Chemical Drive
description: Baseline chemical propulsion for sublight travel.

name: Ion Drive
description: Efficient ion propulsion for extended range operations.

name: Fusion Drive
description: High-thrust fusion propulsion for rapid system transit.

name: Basic Environmental Control
description: Standard heat radiator panels for thermal management.

name: Advanced Radiators
description: High-surface-area radiator arrays with active cooling.

name: Cryo-Radiator System
description: Cryogenic heat exchange system for maximum thermal dissipation.

name: Basic Comms Array
description: Standard radio and laser communication systems.

name: Subspace Comms Array
description: Faster-than-light subspace communication for fleet coordination.

name: Quantum Entanglement Comms
description: Instantaneous quantum-paired communication across any distance.

name: Basic Bio Reclaim
description: Water recycling and waste processing for crew sustainment.

name: Advanced Bio Reclaim
description: Improved recycling efficiency extending time between resupply.

name: Closed-Loop Bio System
description: Near-perfect matter recycling for extended deep space operations.

name: Cutting Beam
description: Sustained-focus thermal beam that melts through hull plating

name: UV Blaster
description: Ultraviolet pulse emitter — rapid cadence, effective against shields

name: Thermal Lance
description: Sustained plasma-heated beam that ignites hull materials

name: Ion Beam
description: Ionised particle stream that disrupts electronic systems

name: Neutron Beam
description: Focused neutron stream — passes through shields to irradiate crew

name: Antimatter Beam
description: Focused antimatter annihilation stream — extreme raw damage

name: Meson Projector
description: Meson beam phases through shields and armour to damage internal systems

name: Singularity Beam
description: Gravitational lensing beam that warps space along its path

name: Quantum Cascade
description: Rapid quantum-tunnelling pulses that bypass all conventional defences

name: Scatter Cannon
description: Fragmentation slug cannon — wide spread, effective against fighters and close targets

name: Coilgun Array
description: Multi-barrel electromagnetic accelerator — sustained suppressive fire

name: Siege Cannon
description: Massive bore cannon firing explosive penetrator rounds — designed for station assault

name: Plasma Slugthrower
description: Fires superheated plasma slugs that splash on impact

name: Hypermass Projector
description: Projects ultra-dense matter at relativistic speed — catastrophic on impact

name: Tactical Nuke
description: Crude fission warhead on a ballistic delivery system — devastating but inaccurate and slow to reload

name: HV Missile Battery
description: High-velocity missiles with improved terminal guidance

name: Torpedo Rack
description: Heavy anti-ship torpedoes — slow rate of fire but punishing damage

name: Cluster Missile
description: Splits into six submunitions on approach — wide area saturation

name: EMP Torpedo
description: Electromagnetic pulse warhead — disables systems and drains shields

name: Swarm Missiles
description: Salvo of eight micro-missiles with cooperative guidance — overwhelms point defence

name: Bunker Buster
description: Armour-piercing penetrator torpedo — designed to crack stations and capital ships

name: Void Seeker
description: Low-observable torpedo with adaptive countermeasures — extremely hard to intercept

name: Phase Torpedo
description: Phases through shields and armour before detonating inside the hull

name: Scatter Field
description: Low-power dispersal field — less raw absorption but deflects incoming missiles

name: Ablative Shield
description: Layered shield that sacrifices outer layers to absorb kinetic impacts

name: Adaptive Shield
description: Analyses incoming fire and dynamically remodulates to resist the dominant damage type

name: Flare Shield
description: Disperses beam energy and deflects guided munitions with electromagnetic flares

name: Hardlight Barrier
description: Solid-light projection that physically deflects objects — effective against rams and boarding

name: Dimensional Ward
description: Partially shifts the vessel between dimensions — projectiles pass through empty space

name: Advanced Warp Drive
description: Optimised warp field geometry for efficient deep-space transit

name: Dimensional Drive
description: Slips between dimensional folds — virtually instantaneous transit across any distance

name: Advanced Fission Reactor
description: Improved fission reactor with better fuel efficiency and output.

name: Advanced Fusion Reactor
description: High-density fusion reactor with magnetic containment optimisation.

name: Zero-Point Reactor
description: Extracts energy from quantum vacuum fluctuations — near-limitless output.

name: High-Density Capacitor
description: Improved capacitor array with denser energy storage

name: Nano-Cell Array
description: Nano-structured energy cells with rapid charge/discharge cycles

name: Rapid Pulse Beam
description: Rapid-cadence pulse beam turret — improved tracking and intercept rate

name: Laser CWIS
description: Close-in weapon system using continuous laser sweep — excellent against fighter swarms

name: Pulse Gatling
description: Multi-barrel pulse cannon with extreme rate of fire

name: Multi-Pulse Flare
description: Omnidirectional pulse emitter creating overlapping interception zones

name: Antimatter Mesh
description: Projects an antimatter particle mesh that annihilates incoming ordnance

name: Micro PBC Gatling
description: Miniaturised particle beam array with predictive targeting — near-perfect intercept rate

name: Triple Layer Mesh
description: Three overlapping defensive meshes — extremely difficult to penetrate

name: Micro Gravity Bender
description: Gravitational lens that redirects incoming projectiles back at the attacker

name: Phase Intercept Array
description: Phase-shifts incoming ordnance into another dimension — the ultimate point defence

name: Assault Fighter Bay
description: Launches 6 armoured assault fighters with light armour plating

name: Bomber Bay
description: Launches 4 torpedo bombers — devastating against capital ships

name: Elite Fighter Bay
description: Launches 10 antimatter-powered elite fighters with advanced countermeasures

name: Drone Swarm Bay
description: Deploys 20 AI-controlled combat drones that coordinate autonomously

name: Jammer Pod
description: Dedicated missile jamming pod — effective against guided ordnance

name: Decoy Launcher
description: Launches sensor-spoofing decoys that draw enemy fire and missiles

name: Signal Distortion Array
description: Distorts all electromagnetic emissions in a wide radius — disrupts enemy fleet coordination

name: Phase-Cloak ECM
description: Phase-modulated ECM that intermittently renders the vessel invisible to sensors

name: Ghost Projector
description: Projects convincing holographic duplicates that draw enemy fire

name: Dimensional Cloak ECM
description: Shifts the vessel partially between dimensions — nearly undetectable

name: Theatre ECM Array
description: Massive electronic warfare array that blankets the battlefield. Enemy missiles lose lock, targeting systems malfunction, forcing opponents into line-of-sight visual engagement.

name: Reality Distortion Array
description: Warps local spacetime to scramble all sensor returns. Against ill-equipped foes, virtually all guided weapons fail to lock.

name: Fire Director
description: Fleet fire coordination system — synchronises volleys across multiple ships

name: Neural Targeting Array
description: Neural-linked targeting system — reaction times approaching precognition

name: Quantum Targeting Matrix
description: Quantum-entangled targeting — fires at where the target will be, not where it is

name: Hull Sealant System
description: Rapid-deploying hull sealant system — seals breaches during combat

name: Nano-Repair Swarm
description: Clouds of nanobots that swarm over damaged sections and rebuild at the molecular level

name: Temporal Repair Field
description: Localised temporal reversal field — literally undoes damage by rewinding time around the hull

name: Gravitic RCS
description: Gravitational thrust vectoring — instant directional changes.

name: Inertialess RCS
description: Negates inertia entirely — the vessel can change direction instantaneously.

name: Heat Sink Array
description: Antimatter-powered heat sinks that absorb and radiate thermal energy at extreme rates.

name: Entropy Radiator
description: Channels waste heat into dimensional folds — effectively limitless thermal capacity.

name: Tightbeam Array
description: Focused laser tightbeam for secure point-to-point communication.

name: Encrypted Subspace Array
description: Hardened encrypted subspace communications resistant to interception.

name: Ansible Network
description: Instantaneous, uninterceptable communication across the entire galaxy.

name: Improved Bio Reclaim
description: Improved water and air recycling with basic food reclamation.

name: Molecular Synthesis System
description: Synthesises food and water from raw elements — virtually unlimited endurance.

name: Perfect Reclamation
description: Complete matter-energy cycling — the vessel is entirely self-sustaining.

name: Exaflop Core
description: High-throughput processing for complex sensor analysis and targeting.

name: Quantum Computer Core
description: Quantum-state computing enabling simultaneous analysis of all threats.

name: Singularity Core
description: Self-evolving AI core that anticipates enemy tactics before they execute them.

name: Arcology Life Support
description: Full artificial gravity and arcology-grade habitability — crew never want to leave.

name: Utopia Life Support
description: Creates a perfect living environment tailored to each crew member individually.

name: Resonance Barrier
description: Dimensional interference pattern that shunts incoming energy into adjacent brane layers — damage simply ceases to exist in three-dimensional space

name: Exotic Matter Armour
description: Hull plating synthesised from trans-dimensional matter with negative mass properties — absorbs kinetic impacts by redistributing force across dimensional axes

name: Brane Drive
description: Punctures the dimensional membrane and slides the vessel through a higher-dimensional shortcut — distances in the Firmament are merely a projection of a far more accommodating geometry

name: Phase Lance
description: Projects a beam that phase-shifts through shields and armour before re-materialising inside the target hull — other species consider this weapon a violation of fair play

name: Membrane Projector
description: Destabilises the dimensional membrane in a target area, causing enemy ships to partially phase out of coherent space — their weapons misfire, their engines stall, and their crews experience reality as a series of contradictions

name: Omnidimensional Sensor Array
description: Perceives all eleven dimensional axes simultaneously — cloaked ships, hidden fleets, and subspace anomalies are laid bare, their three-dimensional concealment meaningless against a sensor that sees in seven additional directions

name: Xenotech Integration Bay
description: A modular workshop fitted into the ship's hull, allowing Ashkari engineers to strip, analyse, and refit captured foreign components during deployment. What goes in as alien scrap comes out as a functioning system.

name: Wreck-Derived Sensor Suite
description: Reverse-engineered from scanning equipment found in the Wreck's mid-decks. The Ashkari do not fully understand the operating principles, but the results are unmistakable — detection ranges that exceed anything their own science could produce.

name: Mirror Analysis Array
description: A dense cluster of passive sensors and rapid-fabrication units that observes enemy weapons fire, analyses its composition, and begins producing countermeasures mid-battle. Each engagement makes the Ashkari vessel slightly harder to kill.

name: Wreck Core Power Tap
description: A carefully shielded conduit to a fragment of the Wreck's central power source, mounted in a containment cradle that the Interpreter Guilds frankly admit they designed by trial and error. It produces more energy than any reactor the Ashkari could build. They try not to think about what happens if the containment fails.

name: Electroreceptive Array
description: Hull-mounted sensory organs derived from Drakmari biology. Detects bioelectric signatures, reactor emissions, and magnetic field distortions with predatory precision.

name: Pressure-Forged Plate
description: Ultra-dense hull plating compressed under abyssal conditions. Heavier than standard composites, but far harder to penetrate.

name: Thermoreceptive Targeting Suite
description: Reads thermal gradients across enemy hulls to identify reactor cores, shield emitters, and ammunition stores. Grants devastating precision against critical subsystems.

name: Seismic Lance
description: Shaped graviton pulse tuned to resonate with common hull alloy crystal structures. Causes sympathetic vibration that tears armour apart from within.

name: Iterative Hull Plating
description: Hull plates that continuously redistribute stress loads, growing stronger at points of repeated impact. After sustained combat, the hull is measurably tougher than when it was built.

name: Cogitator Core
description: A recursively self-improving tactical processor that rewrites its own targeting algorithms mid-engagement. Each salvo is informed by every salvo that preceded it. The Teranos diplomatic corps has formally requested that this device be classified as a war crime.

name: Basalt Composite Plate
description: Volcanic glass-fibre composite forged in open lava flows — heavier than standard plating but remarkably heat-resistant

name: Ironbound Hull Plate
description: Hand-fitted interlocking volcanic alloy plates, each one signed by its forge-clan — heavy, unyielding, and built to endure

name: Forge-Breaker Cannon
description: Massively over-bored siege cannon firing white-hot tungsten slugs — designed to crack fortifications, not chase fighters

name: Magma-Tempered Plate
description: Hull plating cycled through controlled magma immersion — the crystalline grain structure absorbs tremendous punishment before fracturing

name: Spectral Shroud
description: A Luminari-designed frequency diffusion field that scatters the vessel's electromagnetic signature across the full spectrum, rendering it indistinguishable from cosmic background noise.

name: Resonance Disruptor
description: Induces destructive oscillations in a target's power conduits and electronic systems. Deals minimal hull damage but degrades shields, accuracy, and engine performance. The Luminari's reluctant concession to the concept of warfare.

name: Nullifier Array
description: Broadcasts precisely calibrated anti-phase waveforms that collapse a target's power grid. Shields fail, weapons go silent, engines stall. The ship is left intact but utterly defenceless — a state the Luminari consider far more civilised than destruction.

name: Living Circuitry Core
description: Organic processing network grown into the hull — responds to bioelectric commands at reflex speed

name: Synaptic Barrier
description: Bioelectric defensive field generated by cultured nerve clusters — dissipates energy along organic pathways

name: Bioelectric Lance
description: Focused discharge from banks of cultured bioelectric organs — overwhelms target conductors on contact

name: Omnilattice Node
description: Subspace bioelectric relay connecting the ship to the galaxy-spanning Omnilattice — unmatched situational awareness

name: Sanctified Lance
description: A beam weapon reverse-engineered from Burning Sky relic fragments — the Orivani do not fully understand the physics, but they have learnt to replicate the energy signature through a process they insist is prayer-guided calibration. It cuts through shields with an efficiency that suggests the original builders designed it for exactly this purpose.

name: Wrath Broadcaster
description: A resonance amplification array tuned to the Hymn of Wrath. When activated, every Orivani crew within range enters a state of biochemical rapture — pain suppressed, reflexes heightened, fear abolished. Enemy crews exposed to the broadcast report feelings of profound unease, as though something vast has noticed them and found them wanting.

name: Reliquary Core
description: The heart of a Cathedral Ship — a consecrated chamber housing fragments of Burning Sky relics, suspended in a resonance field maintained by continuous chanting. Crews stationed near the Reliquary report heightened reflexes, reduced fatigue, and an unshakeable conviction that they cannot lose. The relics pulse in time with the singing. No one has explained why.

name: Defiance Array
description: The final evolution of Orivani resonance technology — no longer a tool of worship but a weapon of refusal. The Defiance Array broadcasts the Defiant Hymn at frequencies that resonate with the Devourer's own communication bands. It is, in effect, a declaration of war transmitted in the enemy's own language. Orivani crews near an active Array fight with a transcendent fury that defies tactical modelling. They have spent twelve thousand years preparing to meet their gods. They are ready. Just not in the way their gods expected.

name: Mantle-Forged Plate
description: Hull armour grown under mantle-equivalent pressure as a single flawless crystal lattice -- no seams, no grain boundaries, no weak points. It does not dent; it shatters incoming projectiles against its own perfection.

name: Resonance Cannon
description: Projects a precisely tuned seismic pulse that vibrates at the resonant frequency of the target's hull material, amplifying stress fractures into cascading structural failure. The ship does not explode -- it comes apart, methodically, as though it had always intended to.

name: Regenerative Hull Membrane
description: Living hull tissue that photosynthesises starlight and slowly knits itself back together after damage. Not strong by conventional standards, but remarkably persistent.

name: Sporedrift Emitter
description: Exhales a dense cloud of engineered spores that corrode guidance systems and degrade incoming ordnance. Purely defensive — the Sylvani insist on this distinction.

name: Threader Calculation Array
description: A cramped compartment of linked Threader stations replacing digital fire control. Slower to lock, immune to electronic warfare.

name: Hardened Fire Control
description: Fully analogue ballistic computer with mechanical cam predictors and optical rangefinding. No software, no firmware, no vulnerability surface. Threader operators handle target prioritisation whilst the mechanism handles the trigonometry.

name: Manual Override Suite
description: Every critical system wired to a physical control station with trained crew. When automation fails — or is sabotaged — these ships keep fighting on muscle memory and hand-cranked backups.

name: Nanomorphic Hull
description: The hull is not plating bolted to a frame — it is a living shell of compressed Thyriaq nanites locked in rigid configuration, capable of shifting density to absorb impacts and sealing breaches by flowing into the wound

name: Geometry Shifter
description: A coordination subsystem that allows the vessel to radically alter its physical profile mid-combat — flattening, elongating, or compressing to present the worst possible target while optimising for the current tactical requirement

name: Distributed Core
description: The ship's command intelligence is spread across every nanite in the hull rather than concentrated in a single bridge or processor. Destroying any section of the vessel merely reduces processing capacity — nothing short of total annihilation can eliminate the mind within

name: Omnimorphic System
description: Every component slot on the vessel can dynamically reallocate function — weapons become shields, engines become sensors, armour becomes computational substrate. The ship is no longer a collection of systems but a single adaptive material responding to circumstance

name: Thoughtsight Sensor
description: A lattice of Velathosi quartz crystals tuned to detect psychic emissions from sentient crews. Reveals crewed vessels at extreme range but is completely blind to automated drones and empty hulks. The sensor's resolution scales with the target crew's emotional state — a panicking bridge crew is visible across an entire system.

name: Psychic Ward Lattice
description: Interlocking piezoelectric crystals grown throughout the hull that absorb psionic attacks and convert stray energy weapon impacts into harmless heat. Provides moderate energy resistance and strong psionic defence, but offers nothing against kinetic projectiles — the Vaelori never expected to be shot at with rocks.

name: Dissonance Projector
description: Projects a focused beam of psychic dissonance that incapacitates sentient crew without damaging the vessel. Targets suffer cascading cognitive failure — loss of coordination, inability to process orders, and overwhelming existential dread. Completely ineffective against automated ships or species without centralised nervous systems.

name: Neural Intercept Suite
description: A filament-derived sensor array that detects and decodes the bioelectric signatures of enemy crew. In combat, it maps the neural state of opposing bridge officers — stress, fatigue, indecision — and feeds this intelligence to Vethara tacticians in real time. The enemy's morale becomes readable as plaintext.

name: Override Projector
description: A weaponised application of the Unbound's forced bonding technique, broadcast at range through a focused neurolytic carrier wave. Targeted crew experience cascading neural suppression — confusion, loss of motor control, and eventually a docile compliance that makes boarding actions trivially easy. The projector does not damage ships. It empties them of will. Most species consider its use a war crime. The Unbound consider it mercy compared to the alternative.

name: Bioite Hull Plate
description: Layered crystalline bioite secreted by Zorvathi workers in overlapping sheets. Seamless, lightweight, and self-sealing — micro-fractures trigger fresh secretion from embedded gland-nodules that fill cracks within minutes.

name: Hive Drone Bay
description: A bioite-walled hatchery bay containing dozens of semi-autonomous strike drones grown from specialised pupae. Each drone carries minimal armament and no self-preservation instinct — it flies its attack vector and detonates. The bay regrows replacements between engagements.
